data.body: COMPLETE via decomposition (config-loop). All three sub-tickets closed: EV-3a [6b1b] core config-backed renames COMPACT_THRESHOLD/SCRATCH_BASE_DIR/REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE (commit 06fd4d94); EV-3b [9492] TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR->REBAR_TRACKER_DIR (commit 479e4ac0); EV-3c [301b] reconciler/LLM tunables (ACLI_TIMEOUT, LOCK budget, ABSENT_GET budget, LLM_MAX_ITERS) + REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE->REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS value-flip (commit 8c2c95b1). All 9 user-facing vars from the EV-3 description renamed with old-name deprecation aliases + warnings; the id-guard value-semantics flip (raise/warn->false/true) implemented with alias mapping + loud per-sync warning. All EV-3 ACs met. Full offline suite green throughout. Verify gate fail-closed preserved.
